notes: SHIP v1.14.337 - FINAL-LOOK DESKTOP 3-region, ship 2 of the desktop+phone re-skin per SPEC-COMMAND-FINAL-LOOK.md (comp = OPTION 2, Downloads/preview (19).webp). This is the DESKTOP surface; the .336 PHONE ship stands. PURE MARKUP+CSS, ZERO JS (lowest-risk shape for a ship this size). #pg-cmd-scoped -> ?legacy byte-identical; Master pipeline read-only; reh3d internals untouched. ARCHITECTURE: the Command page children are grouped into a LEFT ASSISTANT RAIL (#cc-rail) + a CENTER column (#cc-center), with cc-z0 kept OUTSIDE both as a full-width status band. Both wrappers DISSOLVE via display:contents below 1024px, so the .336 phone reflow renders BYTE-IDENTICAL (the phone order values are unchanged; only the reflow selectors moved from `#pg-cmd > X` to descendant `#pg-cmd X` to match through the dissolved wrappers). At >=1024px #pg-cmd becomes display:grid (340px rail | minmax(0,760px) center, justify-content:center so it centres on wide screens; .page is position:absolute inset:0 so margin:auto can't center it). SHIPPED (all >=1024px, all real doors - no dead chips): (1) LEFT RAIL = AI ASSISTANT card + NBA + QUICK TOOLS (reused from .336) + NEW SUGGESTED ACTIONS card (Summarize shift -> shiftReport_generate(); Open brief -> brief_show(); Review blockers -> cmd_route('work','issues') - this RESOLVES the open Z5 flag: Shift Report + Brief now have a confirmed desktop home) + NEW CHAT WITH PHANTOM button (violet primary -> openVaSheet()) + NEW AI STATUS foot line. (2) CENTER COLUMN = status band (cc-z0) + rack line/hero/vitals (the live INSPECT-3D, NEXT-U marker intact) + stat cards + the deploy/scan/handoff telemetry tiles (cmd_telemetry already fills tt-deploy %+bar = the comp's deploy-progress card, no sparkline, honest) + OPS SIGNAL + NEW honest FOOTER (SECURE SESSION - ON-DEVICE + brand; NO fake EKG/health telemetry). New elements carry BASE display:none so the phone is unchanged; the >=1024 block reveals them; the S0 (data-master=0) hide-list was extended to cover them. S0 desktop = single-column, ingest zone fills, empty rail collapses. SUPERSEDE (owner ruling, reconcile-not-stack): the .278 centered column (@media min-width:980px, the 'all nine rows' block) narrowed to (min-width:980px) and (max-width:1023px) = a 980-1023 tablet band; >=1024 is fully owned by the new grid; the 8764/L8769 #pg-cmd 1080-cap is overridden by higher-specificity #cc-rail>* / #cc-center>* resets. DROPPED per rulings: no sparkline (honest bar via the existing telemetry tile); Suggested Actions omits 'Recommend next step' (= the NBA sitting right above it, dup door) and 'Check system health' (no real door exists - not invented). DEFERRED (report, NOT built - separate concerns): (a) the desktop TOP NAV (HOME/BUILD/TOOLS/RACKS bar) -> ship .338; it restyles the SHARED #rd-botnav/.app-header chrome (renders in both houses = the one legacy-leak-risk edit), isolated so this big content ship carries zero shared-chrome risk; desktop keeps the existing bottom nav (same as today's .278 desktop). (b) the persistent RACK-SWITCHER list -> kept the existing cc-rackline tap -> cmd_heroPickRack() overlay (a list = a 2nd door to rack-switching + the priciest net-new widget). Gates: inline-JS vm.Script x3 (JS untouched), CSS brace net-0, sw.js ok, version.json valid, three-stamp .336->.337; phantom-ship-gate + phantom-rd-reviewer pre-commit. DEVICE-VERIFY (HARD-REFRESH / clear SW first): (DESKTOP browser >=1024px) two-column layout - assistant rail left, center column right, status band spanning the top, footer honest; suggested actions + chat + rack + telemetry all reachable and route correctly; S0 (no Master) = centered ingest, rail collapsed. (PHONE, since .337 touched the reflow selectors) re-glance that the .336 phone is UNCHANGED - assistant card at top, single NBA, pills Online/Ready/Active, rack + NEXT-U + QUICK TOOLS all still work, S0 full-screen ingest. ?legacy=1 pixel-identical. ROLLBACK: revert this commit (restores the .336 layout; phone falls back to the pre-wrapper flat DOM).
